message:
feat(runtime): add anytime-valid e-process throttle for streaming recompute control (bd-1b5h.12)

Implements EProcessThrottle using a wealth-based betting strategy (test
martingale) to decide when accumulated evidence warrants recomputation
during high-frequency log ingestion. Provides anytime-valid Type I error
control (P(∃t: W_t ≥ 1/α) ≤ α under H₀) with adaptive GRAPA lambda,
hard deadline fallback, and JSONL decision logging. 27 tests including
property tests for supermartingale and Type I control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
